impact: Evidence-specific definitions could eventually be split from the large general app-data module.
resolution: Split evidence-specific event schema definitions out of the large general DynamoDB app-data module into src/lib/dynamodb/evidence-schema.ts. app-data.ts now imports the schema for validation and re-exports the public evidence types to preserve existing callers, while record shapes and repository behavior remain in app-data.ts.
